mapper.insert: insert into gray_plans(plan_name, target_type, target_id, traffic_percent, steps_json, start_time, status) values(#{planName}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{trafficPercent}, #{stepsJson}, #{startTime}, #{status})
mapper.select: select id, plan_name, target_type, target_id, traffic_percent, cast(steps_json as char) as steps_json, start_time, status from gray_plans order by id desc
select id, plan_name, target_type, target_id, traffic_percent, cast(steps_json as char) as steps_json, start_time, status from gray_plans where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update gray_plans set status = #{status} where id = #{id}
